canonical_definition: The latent ability of a model to perceive, ground, and reason about objects and scenes in three-dimensional space based on 2D image inputs.
papers: Oryx MLLM: On-Demand Spatial-Temporal Understanding at Arbitrary Resolution

definitions.text: The latent ability of a model to perceive, ground, and reason about objects and scenes in three-dimensional space based on 2D image inputs.
The cognitive capability to infer spatial relationships, properties, and context of objects in a 3D coordinate system.
The ability to comprehend and reason about the spatial relationships of objects and scenes from multi-view 2D images.
definitions.paper: Oryx MLLM: On-Demand Spatial-Temporal Understanding at Arbitrary Resolution

relationships.paper: Oryx MLLM: On-Demand Spatial-Temporal Understanding at Arbitrary Resolution
